name: Sync Shopify customers with Cegid Y2 on create or update

parameters.content:
## About the author


**COD4IS** is a recognized consulting firm specializing in Retail Information Systems. From CRM and POS to ERP, e-commerce, and supply chain, COD4IS helps specialty retailers design, implement, and run the systems that power their business; combining business consulting, technical integration, and worldwide support for store and head-office teams.

🌐 [Our website](https://cod4is.com)  
✉️ [Contact us](mailto:contact@cod4is.com)

## Step 2 - Mapping

The mapping is made in accordance with CEGID's API Customers (V2)

https://12345678-test-retail-ondemand.cegid.cloud/Y2/swaggerui/?urls.primaryName=Customer%20API
## Step 3 - Create or update customer in CEGID Y2

## Sync Shopify customers with Cegid Y2 on create or update
**This workflow syncs customers created or updated in Shopify to CEGID Y2, in real time via webhook.**

### ⚙️ How it works
1. A Shopify webhook fires whenever a customer is created or updated.
2. The customer data is mapped to the CEGID format (**API Customers V2**).
3. The customer is created in CEGID — or updated if it already exists.

### 🛠️ Setup
**1. Create a webhook in Shopify** pointing to this workflow's webhook URL, for both events:
- Customer creation
- Customer update

**2. Fill out the "Set CEGID Config" node** with your values:
- `cegid_api_url` — your CEGID API base URL (e.g. `https://12345678-test-retail-ondemand.cegid.cloud`)
- `cegid_folder_id` — the CEGID folder ID (e.g. `12345678_002_TEST`)
- `default_store` — the CEGID store code (e.g. `WEB01`)
- `default_country` — the default country in ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 format (e.g. `FRA`)
- `default_currency` — the default currency (e.g. `EUR`)
- `tax_system_id` — the CEGID tax system ID (e.g. `FR1`)

**3. Add your credentials** — set the same HTTP Basic Auth credential on both the *Create* and *Update* nodes:
- **User**: `cegid_folder_id\cegid_user` (e.g. `12345678_002_TEST\ABC`)
- **Password**: your CEGID account password

### 📝 Good to know
This workflow only syncs the data available in the Shopify webhook payload. Any customer fields not included in the webhook (or not sent by Shopify for a given event) will not be synced to CEGID.

That's it — you're ready to go! 🚀
